Tests the multiplication of a string and a number in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the result of multiplying a `String` object containing the character "2" by a `Number` object with the value `1`. The expression `new String("2") * new Number(1)` is expected to evaluate to the number `2`. The `assert` function verifies that this condition is true, and if it is not, the program will throw an error. This code provides narrow functionality, serving as a basic test to ensure that type coercion in JavaScript correctly converts the `String` to a `Number` during the multiplication operation.
